full_text:
Zhou Yin 周胤
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhou Yin (周胤). The second son of Zhou Yu. Exiled for misdeeds, later pardoned. Zhou Yin was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Zhou Yin lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
